text.en: First-author paper "Mapping histological and functional maturation of human endocrine pancreas across early postnatal periods" accepted by Nature Communications
text.zh: 共同第一作者论文《Mapping histological and functional maturation of human endocrine pancreas across early postnatal periods》被 Nature Communications 接收。

text.en: Abstract "Spatial Organization of Human Islet Endocrine Cells Modulates Stimulated Hormone Secretion" accepted by ADA Scientific Sessions 2026 as an oral presentation.
text.zh: 《Spatial Organization of Human Islet Endocrine Cells Modulates Stimulated Hormone Secretion》被 ADA Scientific Sessions 2026 接收为口头报告。

text.en: Fan Feng is the recipient of the 2025-2026 Postdoctoral Excellence in Innovation Award @Vanderbilt University.
text.zh: 荣获 2025-2026 范德堡大学博士后创新奖。

text.en: First-author paper "Statistically rigorous and computationally efficient chromatin stripe detection with Quagga" published in Genome Biology
text.zh: 第一作者论文《Statistically rigorous and computationally efficient chromatin stripe detection with Quagga》发表于 Genome Biology。

text.en: PanKbase (a knowledge base for the pancreas & diabetes community) released at ADA Scientific Sessions 2025, Chicago.
text.zh: PanKbase（胰腺与糖尿病知识库）在 ADA Scientific Sessions 2025（芝加哥）发布。

text.en: Poster presentation on multiplexed image analysis at ADA Scientific Sessions 2025, Chicago.
text.zh: 在 2025 ADA Scientific Sessions（芝加哥）进行多重影像分析海报展示。

text.en: Received the Data Resource Trainee Scholar Award from the Integrated Islet Distribution Program (IIDP).
text.zh: 获得 IIDP（Integrated Islet Distribution Program）Data Resource Trainee Scholar Award。

text.en: Received the AI Workshop Young Scholar Travel Award from NIDDK.
text.zh: 获得 NIDDK 颁发的 AI Workshop Young Scholar Travel Award。

text.en: Invited talk: "Application of knowledge graphs in biomedical fields" at the CCHC Omics Seminar.
text.zh: 受邀报告：在 CCHC Omics Seminar 分享《生物医学中的知识图谱应用》。

text.en: Started as a Research Fellow in the Brissova Lab at Vanderbilt University Medical Center.
text.zh: 加入范德堡大学医学中心 Brissova 实验室，开始博士后研究工作。

text.en: Defended Ph.D. in Bioinformatics at the University of Michigan.
text.zh: 于密歇根大学完成生物信息学博士论文答辩。

text.en: Invited talk: "GenomicKB: a knowledge graph for human genome" at ISMB 2023, Lyon, France.
text.zh: 受邀在 ISMB 2023（法国里昂）报告《GenomicKB: a knowledge graph for human genome》。

text.en: Talk at GLBIO 2023 (Montreal) on a generalizable framework (EPCOT).
text.zh: 在 GLBIO 2023（蒙特利尔）报告通用预测框架 EPCOT 相关工作。

text.en: Poster presentation at GLBIO 2023 on GenomicKB.
text.zh: 在 GLBIO 2023 展示 GenomicKB 海报。

text.en: First-author paper "GenomicKB: a knowledge graph for human genomics" published in Nucleic Acids Research.
text.zh: 第一作者论文《GenomicKB: a knowledge graph for human genomics》发表于 Nucleic Acids Research。

text.en: Invited talk at ISMB 2022 (Madison): "Connecting high-resolution 3D chromatin organization with epigenomics".
text.zh: 在 ISMB 2022（麦迪逊）受邀报告《Connecting high-resolution 3D chromatin organization with epigenomics》。

text.en: First-author paper on 3D chromatin organization (CAESAR) published in Nature Communications.
text.zh: 第一作者三维染色质相关论文（CAESAR）发表于 Nature Communications。

text.en: Co-first-author paper on the 3'HS1 CTCF site published in eLife.
text.zh: 共同第一作者论文（3'HS1 CTCF 位点）发表于 eLife。

text.en: Co-author paper "scHiCTools" published in PLoS Computational Biology.
text.zh: 合作者论文《scHiCTools》发表于 PLoS Computational Biology。
